ingredients: 1 small fresh red chilli, finely chopped
Salt and black pepper, to taste
steps: Rinse clams well in several changes of cold water; discard any open or damaged.
Peel and deseed tomatoes, then chop the flesh.
Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
Heat olive oil in a large pan; briefly fry garlic and chilli. Add tomatoes, then clams and a splash of wine; bring to the boil.
Cover and cook 3 to 4 minutes until clams open (discard any that stay shut).
Drain pasta, add to the clam pan with parsley, toss and serve.
tips: Salt clams and pasta water carefully since clams add briny seasoning; keep the pan covered so clams steam open quickly.
